management.title: Knowledge Bases
management.subtitle: Manage knowledge bases and routing rules within the current deployment domain.

card.deleteConfirm: Delete knowledge base "{name}"? This cannot be undone.

create.title: New knowledge base
create.subtitle: Create Knowledge Base
create.desc: Create an isolated knowledge base. Data and tasks are scoped by kb_name within the current deployment domain.
create.kbNamePlaceholder: letters, digits and underscore only, e.g. kb_medicine
create.kbNameHint: Immutable after creation; used as the kb_name scalar filter inside this domain's Milvus Database.
create.kbNameError: lowercase letters, digits and underscore only
create.descPlaceholder: Clinical inserts, drug registration approvals, etc.
create.probeExplain: When the ratio of text-extractable pages in a PDF is below this value, route to PixelRAG for visual rendering; otherwise use Knowhere text parsing.
create.collectionsHint: The new KB reuses the base dual collections (eagle_text / eagle_visual) in this domain's Database, isolated by the kb_name scalar.

format.title: Document Format Distribution
format.empty: No ready documents in this knowledge base.

volume.title: Ingestion Volume · 7d
volume.empty: No documents ingested in the last 7 days.

table.name: Document
table.empty: No documents in this knowledge base yet.
table.deleteDocConfirm: Delete document "{name}"? This will remove its vectors and graph data.

docDeleteModal.title: Delete Document
docDeleteModal.subtitle: document_id: {id}
docDeleteModal.desc: This will permanently delete the document's vectors, graph nodes, and registry entry for "{name}". Original file is preserved.
docDeleteModal.hint: Original document file is preserved, but all index data will be permanently cleared. You will need to re-ingest to restore search.

detail.logsEmpty: No ingest tasks for this knowledge base yet.
detail.purgeConfirm: Purge knowledge base "{name}"? All vectors, graph data and registry entries for this KB will be removed.

maintenance.title: Danger zone
maintenance.desc: These actions change index data for this knowledge base. Confirm each step carefully.
maintenance.rebuildDesc: Re-parse and re-vectorize every document. Original files stay; search may be incomplete while the job runs.
maintenance.purgeDesc: Permanently delete vectors, graph nodes, and registry entries. Original files stay, but search is cleared until you re-ingest.

rebuildModal.title: Rebuild Index
rebuildModal.subtitle: kb_name: {name}
rebuildModal.desc: This will re-parse and re-vectorize all documents in this knowledge base. Original files are preserved, but search may return incomplete results during the process.
rebuildModal.hint: This may take a while. You can track progress in the logs.

purgeModal.title: Purge Knowledge Base
purgeModal.subtitle: kb_name: {name}
purgeModal.desc: This will permanently delete all vectors, graph data, and registry entries for this knowledge base. This action cannot be undone.
purgeModal.hint: Original document files are preserved, but all index data will be permanently cleared. You will need to re-ingest or rebuild the index to restore search.
purgeModal.error: Purge failed. Please try again later.
